variants: Aurelio Moncada hails from Emerald Shores, where he was born and raised before attending Greymoor College of Science for his studies. After his graduation, he joined Zenith Sable Advisors, utilizing Korean Hangul as his main professional language. In his spare time, Aurelio also engages with the Everbright Foundation, dedicating his efforts to civic initiatives and volunteer work. His ability to merge his academic background with his linguistic skills underscores his commitment to both his career and community service.
